profile.name: Animesh Singh
profile.tagline: Building intelligent systems, solving complex problems, and turning data into actionable insights.
profile.role: Software Engineer | Data Science & Risk Analytics Enthusiast
profile.specialization: Backend Development, Machine Learning, NLP, Risk & Investigations
profile.bio: I am a Computer Science undergraduate specializing in Data Science with hands-on experience in backend development, machine learning, and NLP-powered systems. I have built scalable APIs, real-time applications, and AI-driven solutions while working with large datasets and production-grade systems. My interests lie at the intersection of technology, risk analysis, investigations, and data-driven decision making. I enjoy solving challenging problems, designing efficient architectures, and continuously learning new technologies.

experience.summary: Worked on large-scale financial data classification and NLP-driven automation systems.
highlights: Engineered a dataset containing 2M+ financial records.
Developed a hybrid NLP and Machine Learning model achieving 99%+ F1 score across 27 categories.
Implemented Sentence-BERT based semantic classification pipelines.
Built real-time prediction and feedback-driven learning workflows.

experience.summary: Built scalable backend systems and production-ready APIs.
highlights: Developed 6+ backend services for production deployment.
Designed secure authentication and authorization mechanisms.
Optimized database schemas and queries for better scalability.
Improved system performance through modular architecture.

experience.summary: Enhanced digital infrastructure and conducted technical mentorship programs.
highlights: Revamped website architecture and user experience.

projects.title: ExpenzoAI
projects.subtitle: AI-Powered Expense Categorization Engine
projects.description: Built an intelligent transaction classification platform using Sentence-BERT and structured financial features, achieving over 99% classification accuracy.

projects.title: Real-Time Chat Application
projects.subtitle: Scalable WebSocket Communication Platform
projects.description: Designed a backend architecture capable of handling 1000+ concurrent real-time messages with secure authentication and optimized database operations.

projects.title: RideEase
projects.subtitle: Ride Sharing Platform
projects.description: Developed a ride-sharing application featuring user matching, real-time updates, and scalable Firebase-powered backend services.

education.degree: B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering (Data Science)

education.summary: Focused on Data Science, Machine Learning, Software Engineering, and Backend Development. CGPA: 7.18/10
